name: CLKFROM
description: Clock From block - receives clock/event signals from a CLKGOTO block via tag
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="..." interfaceFunctionName="CLKFROM" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="clkfrom" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="CLKFROM" value="From">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="1" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="A"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabDouble as="integerParameters" height="0" width="0"/>
  <Array as="objectsParameters" scilabClass="ScilabList">
    <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
      <data line="0" column="0" value="A"/>
    </ScilabString>
  </Array>
  <ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabDouble as="dState" height="0" width="0"/>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="40.0" height="20.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Tag value 'A' is duplicated in exprs AND objectsParameters
objectsParameters contains ScilabString with same tag value
Command port with initialState=-1.0 (event port signature)
criticalRules: Must match with a CLKGOTO block with the same tag name
Use CLKGotoTagVisibility to manage tag scope
Can receive from multiple CLKGOTO blocks with same tag
Creates implicit connection - no visible wire needed
commonUses: Event signal routing across long distances in diagram
Connecting event signals across subsystem boundaries
Avoiding wire clutter in event-driven models
